div.div: Comprehensive Land, Tree & Structure Valuation Tool
Survey, Village & Dates / सर्वे, ग्राम एवं तिथियाँ

field.name: survey_type
field.help: Rural uses < 20m threshold for Main Road; Urban uses < 50m threshold. Affects whether Main Road or Beyond-Main-Road base rate is applied.

field.name: village_id
field.help: Auto-loads Base Rate per Hectare from the Land Rate Master (active record) for this village.

field.name: section4_date
field.help: Start date for Interest computation under Section 30(2) of the LARR Act.

field.name: award_date
field.help: End date for Interest computation. Interest accrues for (Award Date − Section 4 Date) days.

field.name: interest_rate_percent
field.help: Interest applied on Market Value. Default 12% p.a. as per Section 30(2) LARR Act. Formula: Land Award × rate × (days ÷ 365.25).

div.div: Acquired Land Compensation / अर्जित भूमि मुआवजा

field.name: distance_from_road
field.help: Determines Road Type automatically. Rural: ≤ 20 m → MR, else MBR. Urban: ≤ 50 m → MR, else MBR.

field.name: road_type
field.help: MR uses the Main Road rate from the Land Rate Master; MBR uses the Other Road rate. Auto-computed from distance but can be overridden.

field.name: irrigation_type
field.help: Irrigated: +20% (rate × 1.20). Unirrigated: −20% (rate × 0.80). Applied to the base rate after the Diverted-Land adjustment.

field.name: has_traded_land
field.help: If the land is Diverted (Traded / व्यापारित), the rate is reduced by 20% (× 0.80).

field.name: acquired_area
field.help: Total acquired area in hectares. Land Award = Effective Rate × Area.

field.name: base_rate
field.help: Base Rate per Hectare. Auto-fetched from the Land Rate Master (active) for the selected village using MR/MBR; or enter manually.

field.name: effective_land_rate
field.help: Effective Rate = Base × (0.80 if Diverted) × (1.20 if Irrigated, else 0.80).

field.name: land_award_amount
field.help: Land Award = Effective Rate × Acquired Area.

field.name: solatium_amount
field.help: Solatium = 100% of Land Award (LARR Act, Sec. 30).

field.name: interest_amount
field.help: Interest = Land Award × (rate% ÷ 100) × (Days ÷ 365.25). Days = Award Date − Section 4 Date.

div.span: Total Land Compensation / कुल भूमि मुआवजा
Total Tree Compensation / कुल वृक्ष मुआवजा
Total Structure Compensation / कुल संरचना मुआवजा
